methodsAttempted.query: site:uc.edu University of Cincinnati generative AI policy students syllabus academic integrity
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found official ai.uc.edu AI guidelines, teaching and learning resources, and additional lower-specificity UC pages.
The AI Guidelines page links to UC AI Policies and Responsible AI pages; the AI Policies page was retained as a verified source.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ai.uc.edu/about UC AI policies generative AI data security conduct
methodsAttempted.notes: Official AI subdomain pages supplied central guidance and applicable-policy mapping. No separate university-wide binding student AI policy was located in this pass.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery for University of Cincinnati found central AI guidance on ai.uc.edu, including general AI guidelines, AI resources for teaching and learning, and AI applicable policies. Rejected official hits included a business analytics training page and an individual course syllabus because they were not central university policy evidence.

targets.sourceTitle: Guidelines on AI use | AI at University of Cincinnati
AI Resources for Teaching and Learning
Policies | AI at The University of Cincinnati

stopConditions: Stop after official ai.uc.edu pages support narrow claim and evidence candidates.
Do not infer a one-size-fits-all course policy where UC says course context varies.
Reject course-specific or training-only pages as noncentral policy evidence.

artifacts.title: University of Cincinnati AI Policy Evidence Draft
artifacts.summary: University of Cincinnati has central AI guidance on ai.uc.edu covering UC-licensed tools, public-data boundaries, course-level syllabus guidance, cautions around AI detection tools, and applicable information security policies for AI use.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No separate binding university-wide student generative AI policy was identified during this pass; central UC pages are guidance and applicable-policy mapping.
Course-specific and training-only UC pages were rejected for institutional policy claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
